purpose: Traceability summary for the path-mined motivating example.

selection_policy.desired_pattern: Full path-mined KGCompass hits a ground-truth method within Top-20 while strict KG, BM25, Regex/FileExpand, and GLM-5 issue-only miss it; the case should illustrate misleading issue-text anchors and file-local KG path mining.
inputs_disallowed: target fixing pull request URLs or explicit target PR references

selected_instance_reason: The issue repeatedly uses has_key, which leads issue-only or lexical methods toward generic cache has_key implementations. The actual edit is in JSONField lookup handling in django/db/models/fields/json.py. Full path-mined KGCompass grounds the JSONField file and mines file-local class/function paths to rank HasKeyLookup.as_sqlite/as_oracle/as_sql in the Top-10; strict KG, BM25, Regex/FileExpand, and GLM-5 issue-only miss the ground-truth method/entity in Top-20.
selection_status: Backed by the path-mined artifact and current no-comment/no-hint paper-valid ledger.
